description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a long, precision barrel and a prominent scope mounted on the top rail. The stock is skeletonized, providing reduced weight and a distinctive open structure, while the grip is ergonomic for improved handling. The receiver and barrel assembly are robust, likely constructed from metal alloys, and the fore-end is ribbed for better grip and heat dissipation. The magazine appears to be a detachable box type, integrated seamlessly into the lower receiver. The muzzle is fitted with a device, possibly a suppressor or muzzle brake, extending the length of the barrel. The overall finish is matte black, giving it a sleek, professional appearance suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern, skeletonized tactical rifle with a long barrel, mounted scope, and matte black finish. Features include a detachable box magazine, ergonomic grip, and a muzzle device.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the skeletonized stock, mounted scope, and muzzle device.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the scope and muzzle device.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and grip.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's open structure and the alignment of the scope along the top rail.
